content: Result: All 16 crates scaffolded and verified. cargo check --workspace passes with zero warnings. All 8 acceptance criteria confirmed: correct dependency wiring (3 foundation crates with 0 deps), cfg-gated platform/web in facade, edition 2024 throughout, examples depend only on vitreous facade. Directory structure matches vitreous-architecture.md exactly. 4 shader .wgsl stubs in vitreous_render/src/shaders/.
